reasoning_chain_text: 1. Compare Ward 7 and Ward 8 by their average 311 service requests across 2019 and 2020, and keep the ward with the higher average.
2. Determine who represents that ward on the DC Council.
3. Determine the university where that council member earned a graduate degree.
4. Determine the founder of that university and the person its flagship National Historic Landmark building is named after.
5. Determine the birth year of each of those two people and return the earlier year.
original_final_question: Among DC wards 7 and 8, identify which ward had the higher average 311 service requests from 2019 through 2020. Who represents that ward on the DC Council? This council member earned a graduate degree from a university whose flagship building is a National Historic Landmark. Among the founder of the university and the person the flagship building is named after, in what year was the earlier-born individual born? Please return the year only. Your response should be in the format [Answer].
